headlines.title: 'Not as bullish': Big banks are entering Q1 earnings season on less certain footing than in January

Why is quantum computing seen as a challenge to Bitcoin?

Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook
headlines.desc: Soaring energy prices are expected to impact China's economy less than most other countries, due to its massive oil reserves and alternative energy sources.

headlines.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
headlines.desc: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Trump signals possible delay to Beijing summit as U.S. pressures China to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.desc: The remarks came as Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent met his Chinese counterpart He Lifeng in Paris, paving the way for the summit scheduled for late March.

headlines.title: Bessent says Treasury is not intervening in oil commodities markets and has no authority to do so
headlines.desc: Bessent addressed rumors that the Treasury Department or some other arm of government might step in to try to lower oil prices.

headlines.title: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
headlines.desc: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.

headlines.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
headlines.desc: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.

headlines.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
headlines.desc: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.

headlines.title: Trump unveils giant gold-accented victory arch design for US capital
headlines.desc: The new monument, if approved, would be taller than the US Capitol building and the Lincoln Memorial.

headlines.title: Here’s when gas prices and airfares could go down if the Iran cease-fire holds
headlines.desc: Stock markets were rallying on Wednesday, but drivers shouldn’t hold their breath waiting for a return to prewar gas prices.

headlines.title: Here are some bargain bank stocks heading into earnings season
headlines.desc: A close look at valuations for the largest U.S. banks highlights opportunities for long-term investors.

headlines.title: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
headlines.desc: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts see strong growth potential in these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Investors should look beyond short-term volatility and consider these growth stocks that analysts see upside for, according to TipRanks.

headlines.title: Oil tankers exit Strait of Hormuz amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
headlines.desc: Three supertankers laden with oil exit waterway amid global energy crunch, shipping data shows.

headlines.title: Saudi Arabia says key oil pipeline back to full capacity after attacks
headlines.desc: The Ministry of Energy says the East-West pipeline is back to pumping about 7 million barrels per day.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.desc: Given ongoing uncertainty, investors may seek to add some stability to their portfolios by buying dividend stocks for steady income.

headlines.title: Trump announces blockade of Strait of Hormuz as Vance leaves Pakistan talks with no deal. How financial markets are reacting.
headlines.desc: As U.S.-Iran talks in Pakistan ended without a deal, U.S. stock futures were sliding and oil was climbing, based on trading via a crypto-based trading platform.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the long-term prospects of these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Amid elevated tensions in the Middle East, top analysts say investors should hold these 3 names for a strong long-term return.

headlines.title: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
headlines.desc: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, as handbags lose appeal.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.desc: These stocks that pay dividends consistently have the ability to generate long-term capital appreciation.

headlines.title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
headlines.desc: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.

headlines.title: Inflation held sticky at 3% as U.S. headed into war with Iran, key Fed gauge shows
headlines.desc: The gauge released Thursday offers the Federal Reserve a snapshot of conditions leading into the Iran war.
